Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.otel

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.otel
OpenTelemetry bridge for the juneau-rest-server TracerHook SPI.

This module is opt-in and ships OtelTracerHook — a bridge that creates one OpenTelemetry Span per @RestOp call, populates the canonical HTTP semantic-convention attributes (http.request.method, http.response.status_code, http.route), and continues an inbound W3C trace context carried on the traceparent / tracestate request headers.

Containment

The io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-api dependency is declared in provided scope on this module's POM. Consumers that want OpenTelemetry-backed tracing must add opentelemetry-api themselves at the version of their choice along with an SDK / exporter combination matching their downstream tracing backend (Jaeger, Zipkin, OTLP, etc.). This way:

  • The core juneau-rest-server jar stays OpenTelemetry-free.
  • Services that never opt in pay zero classpath cost.
  • Services that DO opt in pick their own OpenTelemetry version (semantic-convention upgrades, security patches) without waiting for a Juneau release.
See Also:
  • OtelTracerHook
  • TracerHook
  • REST Server — Observability (Micrometer + OpenTelemetry)
  • OpenTelemetry HTTP semantic conventions
  • W3C Trace Context
Since:
10.0.0

    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
    Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.

    Description
    OtelTracerHook
    TracerHook bridge that opens an OpenTelemetry Span for every @RestOp call.
